reason: The statement applies because the protagonist in this story, Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego, refused to worship the golden image set up by King Nebuchadnezzar, even under the threat of being cast into a burning fiery furnace. They stood firm in their faith and loyalty to their own God, demonstrating that they were not working with the enemy, in this case, the king's decree to worship the golden image.
